creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 161466
devel/hgview: update to 1.8.2

This port was marked broken and now deprecated apparently in error. The LOGILAB definition was removed from bsd.sites.mk and ports using that were marked broken half a year ago. However, the first entry of the former LOGILAB list is the same as the current active download link on the project page. If the Logilab mirrors went out of service then the LOGILAB list should have been pruned, not removed.

Apparently there were only two ports using that site macro, so instead of reviving the macro, revive this port by using the proper download URL directly in MASTER_SITES. While here, update to the port to the current release and refresh the pkg-plist.
